channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Can't sleep? 5 foods that may help you get better rest tonight - Fox News
item.description:
1. Can't sleep? 5 foods that may help you get better rest tonight  Fox News
  2. Doctors Reveal the Number-1 Food to Help You Fall Asleep Faster  AOL.com
  3. I tried eating these 3 fruits for better gut health — a registered dietician explains why they improved my sleep too  Tom's Guide
  4. Sleep hygiene isn’t complete without nutrition—here’s the missing piece  MDLinx
  5. Here’s what to eat every day to sleep a little better  NZ Herald

item.title: Scientists Unveil a Material So Powerful It Eliminates Superbugs on Command - Indian Defence Review
item.description: Scientists Unveil a Material So Powerful It Eliminates Superbugs on Command  Indian Defence ReviewView Full Coverage on Google News
